message:
feat(allowlist): add match_rule method with wildcard pack support

Extends LayeredAllowlist with a method to check if a (pack_id, pattern_name)
pair is allowlisted. This enables the evaluator to consult allowlists when
a pack pattern matches, potentially overriding DENY → ALLOW.

New functionality:
- LayeredAllowlist::match_rule(pack_id, pattern_name) -> Option<AllowlistHit>
- Searches layers in precedence order (project > user > system)
- Supports exact matches: "core.git:reset-hard"
- Supports pack-scoped wildcards: "core.git:*" matches any pattern in pack
- Security: rejects wildcard pack_id ("*:pattern") to prevent global bypass
- AllowlistHit struct provides borrowed view of (layer, entry)

Also adds:
- Default impl for LayeredAllowlist (empty layers)
- Comprehensive test for wildcard pack rule matching

This is the foundation for allowlist-based exception handling in the
command evaluator and hook pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
